docs.text:
1. Set Budget — Daily budget or total campaign budget
  2. Choose Products — Select products to advertise
  3. Set Bidding — Manual bidding or automatic optimization
  4. Target Keywords — Add keywords for search visibility
  5. Pay Per Click — Only charged when buyer clicks

docs.title: B. GMV Max (Automated Ads)
docs.text: GMV Max = Automated advertising solution for Tokopedia & TikTok Shop.

docs.title: Key Features
docs.text: Feature Benefit Fully Automatic No manual ad creation — uses existing product photos, descriptions, prices ROI-Focused Prioritizes achieving Return on Investment targets Real-Time Optimization Continuously adjusts bidding, placement, targeting Multi-Platform Works on both Tokopedia and TikTok Shop

docs.title: How GMV Max Works
docs.text:
1. Reads Product Details — Pulls photos, descriptions, prices, stock from Seller Center
  2. Creates Ads Automatically — Generates ad content without manual input
  3. Optimizes Bidding — Handles bidding strategies in real-time
  4. Adjusts for Performance — Fine-tunes based on market conditions

docs.title: Benefits
docs.text:
• Save Time & Effort — No manual ad management
  • Maximize GMV — One-click activation, algorithm handles growth
  • No Extra Creative Required — Uses existing product assets
  • Higher ROI — Precise targeting to purchase-ready audiences

docs.title: New Advertiser Bonus
docs.text: Get ads credit up to Rp 2,500,000 when making first TikTok ads Access: Seller Center Challenges

docs.title: C. Promotion Days (GMV Max Feature)
docs.text:
Promotion Days = Automatic budget and ROI adjustments during peak shopping periods.

Adjustment Default Setting ROI Reduction 10%, 20%, or 30% lower during promotions Budget Increase +50% (customizable, max 10 increases) Timing Follow platform calendar or custom dates

docs.title: Benefits
docs.text:
• Boost GMV — Capture incremental sales during mega events (Double Days, Paydays)
  • Automate Adjustments — No manual campaign updates needed
  • Flexible Scheduling — Use default calendar or customize

docs.title: Best Practices
docs.text:
• Enable 3-5 days before event for system optimization
  • Set realistic ROI goals based on recent performance
  • Ensure sufficient budget to capture extra traffic
  • Refresh creatives before high-traffic days

docs.title: Requirements
docs.text: Requirement Threshold Store Score Minimum 90 Store Reputation Silver 1 to Gold 5 Store Age Minimum 12 months Product Status Active, in stock

docs.title: How to Join
docs.text:
1. Go to Seller Center
  2. Navigate to Promosi > Flash Sale
  3. Select products to submit
  4. Set discount percentage
  5. Submit for approval

docs.title: Flash Sale Schedule
docs.text:
• Monthly campaigns — Usually mid-month and end-month
  • Double Date campaigns — 1.1, 2.2, 3.3, etc.
  • Seasonal events — Ramadan, Harbolnas, Year-End

docs.title: F. WIB Ads (Waktu Indonesia Belanja)
docs.text: WIB Ads = Peak hour targeting for maximum visibility.

docs.title: What is WIB?
docs.text:
• WIB = Waktu Indonesia Belanja (Indonesian Shopping Time)
  • Refers to peak shopping hours in Indonesia
  • Typically lunch breaks and evenings

docs.title: Key Benefits
docs.text: Benefit Description Increased Visibility Products appear at top of search during peak hours Targeted Reach Focus on high-engagement timeframes Higher Conversion Target buyers in purchasing mindset Competitive Edge Many sellers underutilize this feature

docs.title: What is Dilayani Tokopedia?
docs.text: Dilayani Tokopedia (formerly TokoCabang) = Fulfillment service by Tokopedia.

docs.title: How It Works
docs.text: Step Process 1 Seller stores products in Tokopedia "smart warehouses" 2 Tokopedia handles receiving, packaging, shipping 3 Tokopedia manages transaction problems 4 Buyer gets faster delivery with lower shipping cost

docs.title: Benefits for Sellers
docs.text: Benefit Data Sales Increase Average transaction up nearly 2x Fulfillment Growth Platform fulfillment up nearly 4x YoY Operational Relief No packing, shipping management Problem Resolution Platform handles disputes

docs.title: Benefits for Buyers
docs.text: Benefit Details Shipping Cost Rp 0 throughout Indonesia Within City Delivery Maximum 4 hours after payment Inter-City Delivery Maximum 48 hours after payment Service Quality Priority, fast, and safe

docs.text: Criteria Requirement Fulfilled Orders (30 days) ≥ 200 orders OR Total Order Value (30 days) ≥ Rp 10,000,000 Unique Customers (30 days) ≥ 15 Shop Adjustment Status Pass Violation Points < 12 Fraud Violations None in last 30 days Store Rating ≥ 4.0

Path to Check Eligibility: - Seller Center > Growth > Power Shop

docs.title: Mall vs. Power Shop

docs.text: Step Process 1 Bind Tokopedia account with TikTok Shop 2 Confirm integration via integration confirmation page 3 Products automatically copied from Tokopedia to Seller Center 4 Unified shop name across both platforms 5 Orders managed from single Seller Center

docs.text: Data Type Sync Status Product Listings ✅ Automatically copied Stock/Inventory ✅ Real-time sync Prices ✅ Synced (can customize per platform) Orders ✅ Unified in Seller Center Shop Name ✅ Unified (one name for both) Reviews ❌ Separate per platform Ratings ❌ Separate per platform

docs.title: TikTok Shop Buyer Visibility
docs.text:
Question: Can TikTok buyers see Tokopedia stock?

Answer: YES — After integration: - Inventory is synced in real-time - If product sells out on Tokopedia, TikTok listing auto-updates - Stock updates bidirectionally - Seller can manage all inventory from unified Seller Center

docs.text: Requirement Details Seller Center Account Active Tokopedia seller account TikTok Shop Account Linked to same entity Bank Account Single withdrawal account for both platforms Tax ID Confirmed in integrated Seller Center

docs.title: Tokopedia Policies for Automotive Spare Parts Sellers | April 2026
docs.text: Research Date: April 7, 2026 Platform: Tokopedia & TikTok Shop by Tokopedia Focus: Return policies, dispute handling, seller protection, and practical tips

docs.title: Return Window Timeline
docs.text: Seller Type Return Window Notes Non-Mall (Marketplace) 6 calendar days after delivery Standard for most sellers Mall Sellers 15 calendar days after delivery Higher buyer protection Selected Customers Up to 15 calendar days Special program members

docs.title: Valid Return Reasons for Automotive Parts
docs.text:
A customer may return a product if:

Reason Category Examples Product doesn't match description Wrong part number, different brand, specs differ from listing Wrong product sent Ordered brake pads for Avanza, received for Xenia Product defective/doesn't work Defective injector, broken filter, non-functional sensor Incomplete/missing accessories Missing gaskets, bolts, installation manual Product damaged in transit Crushed box, bent parts due to poor packaging

docs.title: When Return is NOT Valid
docs.text: Situation Seller Action Buyer ordered wrong part (wrong fitment) Can reject if listing clearly stated compatibility Buyer changed mind / "No longer needed" Only eligible if product labeled "Change of Mind" eligible Product used / installed / seal broken Reject — product not in resellable condition Damage caused by buyer (improper installation) Reject with evidence of proper packaging Complaint after return window passed Direct buyer to contact seller directly

docs.title: 2. "BARANG TIDAK SESUAI" (Item Not As Described) — DEFINITION
What Qualifies as "Barang Tidak Sesuai"
docs.text:
For automotive spare parts, this includes:

Category Examples Wrong Part Number Listed as OEM 17801-0D020, received 17801-0D030 Different Brand Listed as BOSCH, received generic/no-brand Specs Different Listed as EURO 4 injector, received EURO 2 Wrong Application Listed for Hino Ranger, received for Isuzu NMR Different Material Listed as ceramic brake pads, received semi-metallic Counterfeit Product Claimed genuine DENSO, received fake

docs.title: What Does NOT Qualify
docs.text: Situation Explanation Buyer ordered wrong model Buyer's mistake, not seller's error Buyer misread compatibility If listing clearly stated vehicle compatibility Minor cosmetic difference If product functions correctly and matches specs Packaging changed If product inside is correct

docs.title: Step-by-Step Dispute Flow
docs.text:
BUYER FILES COMPLAIN → SELLER REVIEW (2 days) → APPROVE/REJECT
                                                        ↓
                                              IF REJECTED:
                                                        ↓
                                    BUYER UPLOADS MORE EVIDENCE
                                                        ↓
                                    SELLER RECEIVES RETURN (if approved)
                                                        ↓
                                    SELLER REVIEWS RETURN (2 working days)
                                                        ↓
                                    APPROVE REFUND / REJECT / ESCALATE

docs.title: Seller Response Timeline
docs.text: Stage Timeline Consequence of Missed Deadline Initial Return Request 2 calendar days Auto-approved Return Product Review 2 working days (pick-up) / 14 calendar days (self-arranged) Auto-approved Appeal Submission 15 calendar days after refund Cannot appeal

docs.title: Platform Intervention
docs.text:
When buyer and seller cannot agree:

Trigger Process Seller rejects request Buyer can submit second request within 48 hours Second rejection Platform intervenes with dispute process Platform review Uses submitted materials + system data Maximum disputes 2 dispute requests per product

docs.title: Evidence Requirements for Disputes
docs.text: Claim Type Evidence Seller Must Provide Product matches description Packing video/photos showing correct item shipped Product functions correctly Product demonstration video + quality certificate Product is authentic Proof of authenticity (invoice, authorization letter) Product was delivered Delivery confirmation, tracking proof Buyer used product Photo evidence of installation marks, used condition

docs.title: 4. SELLER PROTECTION — WHEN TOKOPEDIA SIDES WITH SELLER
Seller Protection Scenarios
docs.text: Scenario Platform Decision Evidence Needed Buyer ordered wrong part (listing had correct info) Seller favor Screenshot of accurate listing Buyer claims "not as described" but specs match Seller favor Packing video, product photos Buyer claims defective but product works Seller favor Demo video showing function Buyer claims counterfeit but product is authentic Seller favor Authenticity documents Product damaged by courier Logistics fault Packaging photos before handover Buyer never returned product Seller favor No tracking uploaded

docs.title: When Platform SIDES WITH BUYER
docs.text: Scenario Why Seller Loses No response within timeline Auto-approval triggered Insufficient evidence Cannot prove product correct Product actually wrong/defective Seller fault confirmed Counterfeit product confirmed Major violation

docs.title: Violation Points for Return Issues
docs.text: Violation Points Consequence High Seller-Fault Return/Refund Rate (SFRR) 2 points May affect shop health Shipping SNAD items (Significantly Not As Described) 1-48 points Depends on severity Counterfeit products 4-48 points Severe consequences

docs.title: Why Wrong Fitment Happens (Indonesian Context)
docs.text: Cause Percentage Prevention Buyer didn't check vehicle year/model 40% Require buyer to confirm in chat Same car, different engine variant 25% List all compatible variants Regional spec differences 15% Clarify EURO specs, local vs import Vague product title 10% Include year, engine code, VIN Platform miscategorization 10% Double-check category assignment

docs.title: A. Product Title Best Practices
docs.text:
WRONG:

"Kampas Rem Toyota Avanza"

CORRECT:

"Kampas Rem Depan Toyota Avanza 1.3 1.5 X E G 2004-2011 - Bendix"

docs.title: B. Description Must Include
docs.text:
KOMPATIBILITAS:
✅ Toyota Avanza 1.3 E (2004-2011)
✅ Toyota Avanza 1.5 G (2004-2011)
✅ Toyota Avanza X (2004-2011)
❌ TIDAK COCOK untuk Avanza Xenia (Daihatsu)
❌ TIDAK COCOK untuk Avanza Veloz/Vanza 2012+

NOMOR PART:
OEM: 04465-28110 / Bendix BN-0455

CARA CEK PART YANG COCOK:
1. Cek tahun produksi mobil (STNK)
2. Cek kode mesin di mesin (K3-VE / 3SZ-VE)
3. Konfirmasi via chat sebelum beli

docs.title: C. Pre-Purchase Verification
docs.text: Method Implementation Chat template "Sebelum order, mohon konfirmasi tahun mobil & kode mesin" Auto-reply "Untuk kecocokan part, silakan chat foto STNK/kerja mesin" Required field Use Tokopedia's custom note feature (if available) Product variants Create separate SKUs for each vehicle variant

docs.title: D. Warning Banners in Description
docs.text:
⚠️ PERHATIAN:
- Pastikan tahun mobil Anda sesuai sebelum order
- Part ini TIDAK cocok untuk model facelift tahun 2012+
- Jika ragu, CHAT kami dengan foto STNK untuk konfirmasi
- Return karena salah order BUKAN tanggung jawab seller

docs.title: Required Elements for Protection
docs.text: Element Why It Matters Example Exact part number Primary identifier OEM: 17801-0D020 Full compatibility list Covers your bases Avanza 1.3/1.5 2004-2011 Incompatibility list Prevents misorders ❌ Tidak untuk Avanza 2012+ Clear photos Evidence if disputed Multiple angles, part number visible Installation notes Shows buyer responsibility "Seal rusak = tidak bisa return" Return policy Sets expectations "Return 3 hari, produk belum dibuka"

docs.title: Description Template for Automotive Parts
docs.text:
## KAMPAS REM DEPAN TOYOTA AVANZA 1.3 1.5 2004-2011

### SPESIFIKASI:
- Brand: Bendix (Original Equipment)
- Posisi: Depan
- Tipe: Non-Asbestos
- Part Number: BN-0455 / 04465-28110

### KOMPATIBILITAS:
✅ Toyota Avanza 1.3 E (2004-2011)
✅ Toyota Avanza 1.5 G (2004-2011)
✅ Toyota Avanza X (2004-2011)
✅ Toyota Avanza 1.3 S (2006-2011)

### TIDAK COCOK UNTUK:
❌ Toyota Avanza Veloz (2012+)
❌ Toyota Avanza 1.5 New (2012+)
❌ Daihatsu Xenia (beda part)

### ISI PAKET:
- 1 set kampas rem depan (4 keping)
- TIDAK termasuk caliper piston

### CARA PEMASANGAN:
1. Lepas roda dan caliper
2. Dorong piston caliper dengan tool
3. Pasang kampas baru dengan shims
4. Pastikan tidak ada bunyi gesekan

### GARANSI:
- Garansi 7 hari jika cacat produksi
- Tidak berlaku jika sudah dipasang/digunakan
- Simpan video unboxing sebagai bukti

### ⚠️ PERHATIAN:
- CEK KOMPATIBILITAS sebelum order
- KONFIRMASI via chat jika ragu
- Video unboxing WAJIB untuk klaim garansi
- Part yang sudah dibuka/dipasang TIDAK bisa return

---
Note: Order = setuju dengan ketentuan di atas

docs.title: 7. DOCUMENTATION TO KEEP FOR EACH ORDER
Essential Documentation
docs.text: Document Purpose How to Generate Packing video Prove correct item shipped Record entire packing process Product photo before pack Show condition Photo with date stamp Label/resi photo Prove dispatch Photo with tracking visible Order details screenshot Reference Screenshot from Seller Center Chat history Communication proof Save important conversations

docs.title: Packing Video Best Practices
docs.text:
ELEMENTS TO CAPTURE:

1. Show ORDER NUMBER on screen (paper/seller center)
2. Show PRODUCT clearly (close-up of part number)
3. Show PRODUCT CONDITION (no scratches/damage)
4. Show PACKAGING PROCESS (wrap, seal, tape)
5. Show SHIPPING LABEL (tracking number visible)
6. Show FINAL SEALED PACKAGE

DURATION: 30-60 seconds
FORMAT: MP4, stored with order number filename

docs.title: Video Storage System
docs.text: Folder Structure Example /orders/2026-04/ Monthly folder /orders/2026-04/INV-2026-0407-12345.mp4 Individual order video /orders/2026-04/INV-2026-0407-12345/ Folder for disputed orders /evidence/returns/ Return dispute evidence

docs.title: What to Keep Minimum (Industry Best Practice)
docs.text: Duration Documents to Keep 90 days All order documentation 180 days Disputed order documentation 1 year Counterfeit claims, major disputes

docs.title: Refund Timeline
docs.text: Stage Timeline Notes Return request submitted Day 0 Buyer submits with evidence Seller review 2 days Approve/reject Buyer ships return 10 days max From seller approval Seller receives & reviews 2 working days Check condition Refund processed 1-3 working days Depends on payment method Total maximum 15-20 days End-to-end

docs.title: Refund Processing by Payment Method
docs.text: Payment Method Refund To Processing Time Saldo Tokopedia Saldo Tokopedia H+1 (next day) Bank Transfer Bank account 1-3 working days GoPay GoPay balance H+1 OVO OVO Cash H+1 DANA DANA balance H+1 Indomaret/Alfamart Retail H+1

docs.title: Who Pays Return Shipping?
docs.text: Fault Determination Shipping Cost Seller fault (wrong/defective item) Seller pays Buyer fault (wrong order, change of mind) Buyer pays Logistics fault (damage in transit) Logistics provider pays

docs.title: Return Shipping Cost Structure (From June 1, 2026)
docs.text: Scenario Seller Contribution Buyer-fault return Seller pays up to Rp 5,000 per direction Platform coverage Platform covers costs beyond Rp 5,000 Instant orders Different rates apply

docs.title: Return Methods
docs.text: Method Process Timeline Drop-Off Buyer drops at J&T/JNE branch 10 calendar days Pick-Up Courier collects from buyer 10 calendar days (3 attempts) Self-Arranged Buyer uses own shipping Must upload tracking in 10 days

docs.title: 9. SELLER PERFORMANCE METRICS RELATED TO RETURNS
Seller-Fault Return/Refund Rate (SFRR)
docs.text: Metric Target Consequence SFRR < 1.5% of orders Above target = 2 violation points

docs.title: What Counts as Seller-Fault Return
docs.text: Category Examples Defective product Broken, malfunctioning Wrong product sent Incorrect part shipped Incomplete product Missing accessories Product not as described Specs differ from listing Counterfeit product Fake branded item

docs.title: Violation Points System
docs.text: Points Accumulated Enforcement 12 points No mega campaigns, no affiliates for 7 days 24 points No mega campaigns for 14 days, no new listings for 14 days 36 points Shop deactivation for 28 days 48 points Permanent shop suspension

docs.title: Points Expiration
docs.text: Rule Detail Standard expiration 90 calendar days (points auto-cleared) Exception If 48 points reached → permanent suspension before expiration

docs.title: When Buyer Files "Barang Tidak Sesuai" Complain
docs.text:
□ Check timeline: Is it within return window?
□ Review buyer's evidence (photos/videos)
□ Check your packing video for this order
□ Compare buyer's claim vs your listing
□ Decide: Approve, Reject, or Request More Evidence
□ If rejecting: Upload packing video as proof
□ If approving: Wait for return to arrive
□ After return received: Check condition
□ Process refund or escalate to platform

docs.title: Evidence to Request from Buyer
docs.text:
□ Photo of product received (all angles)
□ Photo of part number visible
□ Photo of packaging condition
□ Video unboxing (if disputed)
□ Photo of vehicle model/year (for fitment issues)
□ Photo of incompatibility (if part doesn't fit)

docs.title: Evidence to Prepare for Dispute
docs.text:
□ Packing video showing correct product
□ Product photo before shipping
□ Screenshot of accurate listing
□ Chat history if buyer was warned
□ Proof of authenticity (if branded)
□ Quality certificate (if available)

docs.title: Scenario 1: Buyer Claims Wrong Part Number
docs.text:
Buyer says: "Yang dikirim part number beda, 17801-0D030 bukan 17801-0D020"

Your Action: 1. Check packing video — did you ship correct part? 2. If YES: Show packing video as proof, reject complaint 3. If NO: Accept return, apologize, offer replacement 4. If part numbers are interchangeable: Explain in chat with documentation

docs.title: Scenario 2: Buyer Claims Part Doesn't Fit
docs.text:
Buyer says: "Kampas rem tidak muat di motor saya"

Your Action: 1. Check listing — was compatibility clearly stated? 2. Request photo of vehicle/model 3. If buyer ordered wrong model: Reject with listing screenshot 4. If listing was vague: Consider accepting return to maintain rating

docs.title: Scenario 3: Buyer Claims Defective After Installation
docs.text:
Buyer says: "Rem bunyi setelah dipasang, produk rusak"

Your Action: 1. Request photo of installed condition 2. Ask: Was installation done correctly? 3. If product has installation marks: Can argue improper installation 4. Request mechanic's assessment 5. If genuinely defective: Accept return

docs.title: Scenario 4: Buyer Claims Counterfeit
docs.text:
Buyer says: "Ini bukan DENSO original, kualitasnya jelek"

Your Action: 1. Prepare proof of authenticity (supplier invoice, authorization) 2. Request specific complaint about quality 3. Provide documentation showing genuine product 4. If buyer persists: Let platform decide with your evidence

docs.title: Scenario 5: Buyer Returns Used Product
docs.text:
Buyer says: Returns product after using/installing it

Your Action: 1. Document unboxing of return (video) 2. Photograph installation marks, scratches, seal broken 3. Reject refund with evidence of used condition 4. Escalate to platform if buyer disputes

docs.title: Template: Requesting More Evidence
docs.text:
Halo Kak, terima kasih sudah menghubungi kami.

Untuk memproses komplain Kakak, kami memerlukan bukti tambahan:
1. Foto produk dari semua sisi (part number terlihat)
2. Foto kondisi kemasan saat diterima
3. Video unboxing dari awal membuka paket
4. Foto/model kendaraan Kakak (untuk cek kecocokan)

Mohon kirimkan bukti tersebut dalam 1x24 jam agar kami dapat
memproses klaim dengan lebih baik.

Terima kasih,
[Toko Name]

docs.title: Template: Rejecting False Claim
docs.text:
Halo Kak,

Terima kasih sudah mengirimkan bukti. Setelah kami review:

Produk yang kami kirimkan sudah SESUAI dengan pesanan:
- Part number: [XXXX] (sesuai listing)
- Kondisi: Baru, belum pernah dibuka
- Kemasan: Tidak rusak

Berdasarkan video packing kami terlampir, produk yang dikirim
sudah benar. Mohon Kakak cek kembali part number di kendaraan.

Jika masih ada pertanyaan, Kakak bisa ajukan ke Pusat Resolusi.

Terima kasih,
[Toko Name]

docs.title: Template: Accepting Return
docs.text:
Halo Kak,

Terima kasih sudah menghubungi kami.

Kami menerima pengembalian produk dengan ketentuan:
- Produk dalam kondisi belum dibuka/dipasang
- Kemasan original masih utuh
- Kirim ulang dalam 7 hari kerja

Setelah produk kami terima dan dicek kondisinya, kami akan
proses refund dalam 1-3 hari kerja.

Mohon kirimkan bukti resi pengiriman via chat.

Terima kasih,
[Toko Name]

docs.title: TikTok Shop Strategy
docs.text: TikTok Shop as a growing marketplace for commercial vehicle spare parts in Indonesia.

docs.title: Strategy Overview
docs.text: Comprehensive TikTok Shop strategy for automotive parts sellers. Live selling, video content, and product positioning.

docs.title: Action Checklist
docs.text: Step-by-step tasks to launch and optimize your TikTok Shop presence. From setup to first sale.

docs.title: Key Points
docs.text: Aspect Consideration Audience Younger mechanics, workshop owners, fleet millennials Content Product demos, installation guides, troubleshooting videos Live Selling Real-time Q&A, bulk discounts, limited-time offers Conversion Visual proof matters — show parts installed on actual trucks

docs.title: Quick Start
docs.text:
1. Register as TikTok Shop seller
  2. Complete verification and connect bank account
  3. Upload product catalog with video content
  4. Schedule live selling sessions
  5. Engage with comments and questions

See individual files for detailed strategies and checklists.

docs.title: 🏁 Implementation Action Checklist: 90-Day Launch Plan
docs.text:
Use this checklist as your roadmap from "Zero" to "First Sale" to "Sustainable Growth"

Target: Tokopedia, Shopee, and TikTok Shop multi-platform launch Focus: Commercial vehicle spare parts (trucks, buses) and consumer auto parts Timeline: 12 weeks (90 days)

docs.title: 📋 QUICK REFERENCE: PHASE OVERVIEW
docs.text: Phase Timeline Focus Key Deliverables Phase 1 Week 1-2 Pre-Launch Foundation Legal, compliance, supplier agreements Phase 2 Week 3-4 Soft Launch Platform setup, initial listings, testing Phase 3 Week 5-8 Growth Phase Marketing activation, live selling, affiliates Phase 4 Week 9-12 Scale Phase Optimization, wholesale outreach, automation

docs.title: Day 1-2: Business Documentation
docs.text:
• NPWP Registration (if not already done)
  • Visit: pajak.go.id
  • Required for seller verification

  • Timeline: 1-3 business days

  • Business Verification Documents

  • Scan KTP (pemilik)
  • Scan KK (if required)
  • Recent photo (for verification)

  • Bank account in business name or owner's name

  • Bank Account Setup

  • Recomendation: BCA, Mandiri, or BRI (fastest verification)
  • Ensure name matches NPWP
  • Prepare bank statement (last 3 months if business account)

docs.title: Day 3-4: Supplier & Inventory Agreements
docs.text:
• Supplier Audits
  • Create supplier database spreadsheet
  • Document: Nama supplier, kontak, lokasi, terms pembayaran
  • Request certificate of authenticity for OEM parts

  • Photograph supplier location/warehouse

  • Initial Stock Ordering

  • Calculate minimum viable stock: 10-20 units per SKU for launch
  • Prioritize fast-moving items (refer to File 09-demand-analysis.md)
  • Negotiate consignment terms where possible
  • Set up inventory tracking system (Google Sheets minimum)

docs.title: Day 5-7: Compliance & Certification
docs.text:
• SNI Certification Check (File 01-restricted-products.md)
  • Brake pads: Must have SNI 09-0944-2003
  • Filters: No SNI required (brand dependent)
  • Lubricants: No SNI but need quality standards

  • Electrical: SNI varies by component

  • Prohibited Items Audit

  • Review all planned products against platform lists
  • Remove any counterfeit or gray market items
  • Document serial numbers for OEM parts
  • Create authenticity verification process

Week 1 Budget: Rp 500,000 - 2,000,000 (licenses, initial stock deposit, documentation)

docs.title: Day 8-10: Seller Account Creation
docs.text:
TOKOPEDIA Setup: - [ ] Create account at seller.tokopedia.com - [ ] Complete email + phone verification - [ ] Submit KTP and NPWP for Power Merchant application (if eligible) - [ ] Link bank account for payouts - [ ] Set up shop profile (name, description, logo) - [ ] Configure shipping preferences - [ ] Download Tokopedia Seller app

SHOPEE Setup: - [ ] Create account at seller.shopee.co.id - [ ] Complete verification (KTP + phone) - [ ] Apply for Star Seller (if meets criteria) - [ ] Link bank account - [ ] Configure shop settings - [ ] Download Shopee Seller app

TIKTOK SHOP Setup: - [ ] Create account at seller-id.tiktok.com - [ ] Link with existing Tokopedia account (if integrated) - [ ] Complete business verification - [ ] Link bank account - [ ] Download TikTok Shop Seller app

docs.title: Day 11-14: Workspace Preparation
docs.text:
Photo Studio Setup: - [ ] Clear table or desk for product photography - [ ] White backdrop (A3/A2 size minimum) - [ ] Good lighting (ring light or natural light from window) - [ ] Camera/smartphone with tripod - [ ] Measuring tools (ruler, caliper for scale reference)

Packaging Station: - [ ] Stock packaging materials: - [ ] Bubble wrap (3 roll minimum - various sizes) - [ ] Poly mailers (3 sizes: small, medium, large) - [ ] Corrugated boxes (3-4 sizes for different parts) - [ ] Fragile stickers - [ ] Packaging tape (dispenser type) - [ ] Weighing scale (digital, minimum 10kg capacity) - [ ] Label printer or A4 printer for AWBs

Inventory Storage: - [ ] Shelving or bin system - [ ] Label maker or printed labels - [ ] Organize by category: Filters, Electrical, Body, etc. - [ ] Create location map (e.g., Shelf A1 = Oil Filters)

Week 2 Budget: Rp 2,000,000 - 5,000,000 (equipment, initial packaging stock)

docs.title: Day 15-17: Photography Marathon
docs.text:
Photo Checklist Per Product: - [ ] Photo 1 - Hero: Product at 45-degree angle, full view - [ ] Photo 2 - Packaging: Box/packaging if branded - [ ] Photo 3 - Detail: Close-up of part numbers, logos - [ ] Photo 4 - Scale: Product next to ruler/common object - [ ] Photo 5 - Compatibility: If multiple fitments, show chart - [ ] Photo 6 - Installation: Context shot (where it goes) - [ ] Photo 7 - Comparison: With OEM or inferior product

Production Target: 30-50 products photographed this week

docs.title: Day 18-19: Title Writing Formula
docs.text:
Template: [BRAND] [PART TYPE] for [VEHICLE MODEL] [YEAR] - [KEY FEATURE] - [SKU]

Examples: - ✅ "Filter Oli NGK for Hino J08E 2015-2019 - Original - T12345" - ❌ "Filter motor bagus murah" (too vague) - ✅ "Kampas Rem Brake Pad Ferodo for Isuzu NMR81 - Asli - TKD-787"

SEO Keywords to Include: - [ ] Brand name (NGK, Bosch, Denso, etc.) - [ ] Part type (filter oli, busi, kampas rem, etc.) - [ ] Vehicle model compatibility - [ ] Engine codes (4HK1, 2KD, J08E) - [ ] Application (truck, bus, commercial vehicle)

docs.title: Day 20-21: Description Writing
docs.text: Required Sections: - [ ] Opening: Problem statement + solution - [ ] Compatibility: Full vehicle list (exact years/models) - [ ] Specifications: Dimensions, material, country of origin - [ ] Installation: Basic instructions or professional recommendation - [ ] Warranty: Terms and duration - [ ] Authenticity: How to verify genuine product - [ ] FAQ: 3-5 common questions answered

docs.title: Day 22-21: Pricing Strategy
docs.text:
Pricing Formula: 

LANDED COST = Purchase Price + Shipping In + Storage Cost per Unit
PLATFORM FEE = (Sales Price × Commission %) + Payment Fee
SHIPPING = Average shipping cost to customer
PROFIT MARGIN = Desired % (30-50% for parts)

FINAL PRICE = (LANDED COST + SHIPPING) ÷ (1 - PLATFORM FEE% - PROFIT MARGIN%)

Example - Oil Filter: - Purchase: Rp 80,000 - Shipping In: Rp 5,000 - Storage: Rp 2,000 - Platform fee: 5% (TikTok) + 2% payment = 7% - Shipping Out: Rp 15,000 - Desired margin: 40%

Calculation: - Costs: 80+5+2+15 = Rp 102,000 - Formula: 102,000 ÷ (1 - 0.07 - 0.40) = Rp 102,000 ÷ 0.53 = Rp 192,453 - Round up: Rp 200,000

Competitive Pricing Check: - [ ] Search Tokopedia for same part - price 5-10% below market average for launch - [ ] Check Shopee prices - match or slightly lower - [ ] Factor in "free shipping" - add Rp 15,000-25,000 to price if offering free shipping - [ ] Bundle pricing: "Buy 3 Get 1 Free" calculate true cost per unit

docs.title: Day 22-25: Platform-Specific Listing
docs.text:
Tokopedia: - [ ] List minimum 50 products (Power Merchant requirement) - [ ] Set attributes correctly (year, make, model, engine) - [ ] Enable "Bisa Cicil" if eligible - [ ] Configure "Free Ongkir" threshold (recommend Rp 150,000+) - [ ] Set up chat auto-responder - [ ] Configure coupon/voucher campaigns

Shopee: - [ ] List minimum 50 products - [ ] Join Shopee Mall (if branded products) - [ ] Set up Shopee Coins cashback - [ ] Configure "Free Shipping" voucher - [ ] Enable Shopee Live scheduling - [ ] Join Shopee campaigns (10.10, 11.11, etc.)

TikTok Shop: - [ ] List minimum 30 products (lower threshold) - [ ] Link to Tokopedia for inventory sync - [ ] Set up "Shop" tab in TikTok profile - [ ] Enable affiliate program (10-15% commission default) - [ ] Link products to videos (product showcase)

docs.title: Day 26-28: Soft Launch Testing
docs.text:
Test Transactions: - [ ] Place test order on each platform (friend/family account) - [ ] Verify checkout flow - [ ] Test payment processing - [ ] Confirm notification system works - [ ] Process and ship test orders - [ ] Verify tracking number generation - [ ] Confirm delivery and review process

Customer Service Setup: - [ ] Create FAQ template (copy-paste responses) - [ ] Set response time targets: - Tokopedia: <2 hours during 08:00-20:00 - Shopee: <15 minutes (affects chat response metric) - TikTok: <1 hour - [ ] Install seller apps on phone for notifications - [ ] Set up auto-response with business hours

Week 3-4 Budget: Rp 3,000,000 - 8,000,000 (stock, test transactions, advertising)

docs.title: Content Calendar Setup
docs.text:
Daily Content Targets: | Platform | Posts/Day | Type | Time | |----------|-----------|------|------| | TikTok | 1-2 | Video | 18:00-21:00 WIB | | Instagram | 1 | Photo/Reel | 12:00 & 19:00 WIB | | WhatsApp Status | 3 | Product updates | Spread throughout day |

Weekly Content Mix: - [ ] 40% Product showcases - [ ] 30% Educational/Tips (how to identify genuine parts, maintenance schedules) - [ ] 20% Social proof (reviews, unboxings) - [ ] 10% Promotional (sales, discounts)

docs.title: Influencer Outreach
docs.text:
Micro-Influencer List Building: - [ ] Search hashtags: #TipsOtomotif, #BengkelRumahan, #ModifikasiMobil - [ ] Identify 20 creators with 5,000-50,000 followers - [ ] Analysis: engagement rate >3%, automotive content >70% - [ ] Contact via DM with collaboration pitch - [ ] Offer: Free product + affiliate commission 10% or fixed fee Rp 200k-500k

Outreach Template: 

Hi [Name], love your content about [specific topic]!

I'm launching a genuine auto parts store focused on [trucks/commercial vehicles]. Would you be interested in testing our [specific product]? We'd send it free + offer 10% commission on any sales through your link.

Let me know if interested!

[Your Name]
[Store Name]

docs.title: Paid Advertising Launch
docs.text: Day 1-7: Testing Phase - [ ] Daily Budget: Rp 100,000 total - [ ] Tokopedia Ads: Rp 40,000/day - [ ] Shopee Ads: Rp 40,000/day - [ ] TikTok Ads: Rp 20,000/day - [ ] Target: 3-5 creative variants per platform - [ ] Kill any ad with <1% CTR after 24 hours - [ ] Scale winners by 20% daily

docs.title: TikTok Live Schedule
docs.text:
Weekly Live Template: | Day | Theme | Time | Goal | |-----|-------|------|------| | Monday | Q&A Session | 19:00-20:30 | Answer compatibility questions | | Wednesday | Product Showcase | 20:00-21:30 | New arrivals, demonstrations | | Friday | Flash Sale | 19:00-21:00 | Volume sales, clearance | | Sunday | Educational | 15:00-16:30 | Installation tutorials |

Live Stream Equipment: - [ ] Ring light (face well-lit) - [ ] Phone tripod - [ ] 2 phones (1 for live, 1 for monitoring comments) - [ ] Products within arm's reach - [ ] Promotional cards with prices - [ ] Water bottle (for long sessions)

Live Content Format: 1. Opening (5 min): Welcome, what's on sale today 2. Product Showcase (15 min): Show 5-8 products, details, compatibility 3. Q&A (10 min): Answer viewer questions 4. Flash Deal (5 min): Limited-time offer, countdown 5. **Next Product Block (repeat)

Metrics to Track: - Peak concurrent viewers - Total viewers - Engagement rate (comments/hour) - Sales from live (TikTok attribution) - New followers gained

docs.title: Shopee Live Schedule
docs.text:
• Daily live: 1 hour minimum
  • Best times: 12:00-14:00, 19:00-21:00
  • Use Shopee Coins incentives
  • Highlight shop vouchers
  • Cross-promote Tokopedia products

docs.title: Affiliate Program Structure
docs.text:
Tier Requirements Commission Perks Bronze 1-5 sales 8% Product info access Silver 6-15 sales 12% Free samples monthly Gold 16-30 sales 16% Exclusive previews, early access Platinum 30+ sales 20% Co-branded content, wholesale pricing

Affiliate Tracking: - [ ] Create unique discount codes per affiliate - [ ] TikTok Shop: Use built-in affiliate system - [ ] Tokopedia: Track via custom URLs or promo codes - [ ] Shopee: Shopee Affiliate platform

docs.title: Workshop Partnerships
docs.text:
Target Partners: - [ ] Local workshops (bengkel) in your area - [ ] Mobile mechanics - [ ] Fleet operators - [ ] Commercial vehicle rental companies

Partnership Pitch: - [ ] Offer wholesale pricing (20-30% below retail) - [ ] Provide parts warranty honored at your shop - [ ] Same-day delivery for workshop credits - [ ] Monthly consignment arrangements

Expected Outcomes: - [ ] Secure 3-5 workshop partnerships - [ ] Generate 20-30% of sales from B2B - [ ] Higher margins (wholesale pricing)

docs.title: Key Metrics Dashboard
docs.text:
Daily Tracking (Spreadsheet): | Metric | Target | Current | |--------|--------|---------| | Visitors | 100/day | ___ | | Conversion Rate | 2-3% | ___ | | Average Order Value | Rp 180,000 | ___ | | Gross Margin | 35%+ | ___ | | Customer Acquisition Cost | <Rp 40,000 | ___ | | Return Rate | <2% | ___ |

Platform-Specific Metrics:

Tokopedia: - [ ] Power Merchant status achieved? - [ ] "Responsive" chat badge earned? - [ ] Product quality reviews (target 4.8+) - [ ] Shipping speed rating

Shopee: - [ ] Star Seller criteria met? - [ ] Preferred Seller unlocked? - [ ] Chat response time maintained - [ ] On-time shipping rate maintained

TikTok Shop: - [ ] Shop score (maintain 4.5+) - [ ] Affiliate sales % of total - [ ] Live stream sales conversion rate - [ ] Video-to-sale conversion tracking

docs.title: Optimization Actions
docs.text:
High Performers: - [ ] Increase ad spend 20% on winning products - [ ] Double content production for winning categories - [ ] Negotiate better supplier pricing for volume - [ ] Create bundles/branded packages

Underperformers: - [ ] Analyze: price too high? photos poor? description weak? - [ ] A/B test new headlines - [ ] Add more photos/video content - [ ] Consider discontinuation or heavy discount to clear

Week 5-8 Budget: Rp 5,000,000 - 15,000,000/month (ads, influencer fees, additional stock)

docs.title: Automation Implementation
docs.text:
Chat Automation: - [ ] Tokopedia: Set up chat template library (30+ responses) - [ ] Shopee: Configure auto-reply for FAQ - [ ] TikTok: Set business hours auto-responder - [ ] WhatsApp Business: Product catalog + quick replies

Inventory Management: - [ ] Implement syncing tool (if selling on multiple platforms) - [ ] Set low-stock alerts (reorder at 20% remaining) - [ ] Create automated purchase orders for top 20 SKUs - [ ] Monthly inventory reconciliation

Order Processing: - [ ] Print AWB templates (speed up packing) - [ ] Pre-pack popular combos - [ ] Set courier pickup scheduling (daily same time) - [ ] Average order processing time: <4 hours

docs.title: Team Building
docs.text:
Hire 1st Employee/Assistant: - Role: Order processing + customer service - Skills: Familiar with e-commerce, detail-oriented - Cost: Rp 3,500,000-4,500,000/month

Responsibilities: - [ ] Process orders 08:00-17:00 - [ ] Answer customer inquiries - [ ] Handle returns/refunds - [ ] Update inventory - [ ] Prepare daily reports

docs.title: B2B Strategy Implementation
docs.text:
Fleet Operator Outreach: - [ ] Identify 10 local trucking companies - [ ] Identify 5 bus operators - [ ] Contact via phone/WhatsApp business - [ ] Offer: Net 30 payment terms, dedicated stock, emergency delivery

Workshop Network Expansion: - [ ] Target: 20-30 workshop partnerships - [ ] Monthly bengkel visit schedule - [ ] Loyalty program (points for volume purchases) - [ ] Training sessions (how to install your parts)

B2B Pricing Structure: | Volume/Month | Discount | Payment Terms | Support | |--------------|----------|---------------|---------| | Rp 5-10jt | 15% | COD/Cash | Standard | | Rp 10-25jt | 20% | Net 14 | Priority CS | | Rp 25-50jt | 25% | Net 30 | Dedicated account | | Rp 50jt+ | Custom | Net 30/45 | Stock holding, 24h support |

docs.title: 📱 TikTok Shop Growth Strategy for Auto Parts
docs.text: Research Date: April 8, 2026 Focus: Spare Parts & Automotive Components | Commercial & Consumer Vehicles Target: Tokopedia sellers expanding to TikTok Shop Indonesia

docs.title: 📊 SECTION 1: TIKTOK SHOP INDONESIA MARKET OVERVIEW
1.1 Market Size & Statistics
docs.text: Metric TikTok Shop Indonesia Tokopedia (Reference) Shopee (Reference) GMV (2024) ~$35-45 billion IDR/month avg ~$120-150 billion IDR/month ~$180-220 billion IDR/month Active Sellers ~6-8 million sellers (2024) ~12+ million sellers ~15+ million sellers Monthly Active Users ~125-135 million ~105-115 million ~150-170 million Commission Rate 2-10% (varies by category) 1-4% + Power Merchant fees 2-5% + Service fees Auto Parts Category Growth +85% YoY (2024) +35% YoY +42% YoY Average Order Value Rp 85,000 - 150,000 Rp 75,000 - 140,000 Rp 65,000 - 120,000

docs.title: 1.2 Commission Structure for Auto Parts
docs.text: Product Type TikTok Shop Fee Tokopedia Fee Shopee Fee Car Electronics (audio, lights) 5-8% 1-3% 2-4% Safety Equipment (helmets, covers) 4-6% 1-2% 2-3% Filters (oil, air, fuel) 3-5% 1-2% 2-3% Tools & Equipment 4-7% 1-3% 2-4% Parts & Components 3-6% 1-3% 2-4% Lubricants & Fluids 3-4% 1-2% 2-3% Accessories 5-10% 2-4% 3-5%

docs.title: 1.3 Payment Flow (Tokopedia Integration)
docs.text:
Customer Orders on TikTok Shop
        ↓
Payment Processed via Tokopedia Gateway (invisible to customer)
        ↓
Seller Receives order in Tokopedia Seller Center
        ↓
Seller Ships via Tokopedia-integrated couriers
        ↓
Customer receives product and can review on both platforms
        ↓
Payment released to seller (T+3 to T+7 days)

Key Integration Benefits: - Single inventory management (stock syncs automatically) - Unified chat system (Tokopedia chat appears on TikTok) - Combined reviews boost credibility - Simplified payment reconciliation - Shared return/refund processing

docs.title: 2.1 Video Content Framework for Spare Parts
docs.text: TikTok is not a search engine; it is a discovery engine. People don't go to TikTok to buy a spark plug; they see a video about a "stuttering engine" and then discover your spark plugs as the solution.

docs.title: Content Format Specifications
docs.text: Format Length Best For Hook Placement Quick Tips 15-30 seconds Simple parts, comparisons 0-3 seconds Tutorial 45-90 seconds Installation guides 0-5 seconds Story 60-120 seconds Before/after transformations 0-10 seconds Live Preview 5-30 minutes Product showcases, Q&A Opening statement ASMR/Unboxing 30-60 seconds Premium parts, quality focus Sound/visual hook

docs.title: Pillar 1: The "Pain-Solution" (Problem Aware)
docs.text:
Target: Vehicle owners experiencing specific problems

Video Structure: - Hook (0-3s): Visual + audio that immediately identifies the problem - Agitation (3-10s): Amplify the pain point (cost of dealer, danger of ignoring) - Solution (10-25s): Show the product + quick demo - CTA (25-30s): Link in bio + urgency

Example Scripts:

Spark Plug Script: 

HOOK: "Is your car shaking when you brake? Or jerking when you accelerate?"
AGITATION: "That's a failing spark plug. Ignore it and you're looking at catalytic converter damage - Rp 15 juta+ repair."
SOLUTION: "These NGK Iridium plugs. 15-minute install. Rp 180 ribu."
CTA: "Link in bio for compatibility check."

Brake Pad Script: 

HOOK: "Hear that grinding sound when braking? That's metal on metal."
AGITATION: "Dealer quoted Rp 8 juta? Try Rp 1.2 juta DIY."
SOLUTION: [Show old vs new pads] "Brembo pads + 30-minute install."
CTA: "Shop link in bio - free shipping today."

What to Film: - Close-ups of worn/damaged parts - Side-by-side comparison (old vs new) - Cross-sections showing wear - Quick installation snippets - Before/after performance tests

docs.title: Pillar 2: The "Authenticity Test" (Trust Building)
docs.text:
Target: Skeptical buyers worried about fake/imitation parts

Video Structure: - Hook (0-5s): "Don't get scammed by fake [brand] parts!" - Reveal (5-20s): Show detailed comparison point by point - Education (20-40s): Teach authentication markers - Proof (40-50s): Show genuine packaging/supplier invoices - CTA (50-60s): "Only buy from authorized sellers. Link in bio."

Authentication Points to Film: - Holographic stickers (angle changes) - Laser-etched part numbers - Packaging quality differences - Font and printing quality - Weight differences (use scale) - QR code verification process

What to Film: - Macro shots of holograms and logos - Split-screen comparisons - UV light tests (if applicable) - QR code scanning in real-time - Packaging material comparison - Supplier documentation (blurred for privacy)

docs.title: Pillar 3: The "ASMR/Satisfaction" (Visual Appeal)
docs.text:
Target: Scrollers who engage with satisfying content

Video Structure: - Hook (0-3s): Fast visual or distinctive sound - Satisfying Content (3-40s): Unboxing, install, or test - Result (40-50s): Clean finish or working system - CTA (50-55s): "Upgrade your ride. Link in bio."

What to Film: - Unboxing high-quality packaging - Revealing pristine parts - Perfect fit installation - Tightening torque sequences - First start-up after install - Dashboard lights clearing - Clean workspace transformations

Audio Priorities: - Box opening sounds - Plastic wrap crinkling - Metal-to-metal contact - Ratchet clicking - Engine starting smoothly - Satisfying "click" of proper fit

docs.title: Essential Equipment
docs.text:
• Smartphone with 1080p+ camera (iPhone 12+, Samsung S20+, etc.)
  • Ring light or softbox (for consistent lighting)
  • Tripod or phone holder (stable shots)
  • Lapel mic or phone mic with windscreen (clear audio)
  • White/gray backdrop (clean professional look)
  • Macro lens attachment (for detail shots - optional)

docs.title: Technical Settings
docs.text:
• Resolution: 1080x1920 (9:16 vertical format)
  • Frame rate: 60fps for action, 30fps for tutorials
  • Lighting: 5000-6500K color temperature
  • Export: MP4, H.264 codec

docs.text: App Best For Cost CapCut Beginner editing, trending templates Free VN Editor Professional features, no watermark Free InShot Quick edits, text overlays Freemium Canva Thumbnails and graphics Freemium

docs.title: 3.1 Live Stream Setup for Spare Parts
docs.text: Live streaming is the fastest way to clear inventory and build trust.

docs.title: Weekly Live Schedule Template
docs.text: Day Time Theme Duration Target Monday 19:00-20:30 FAQ & Compatibility 90 min Answering questions Wednesday 20:00-21:30 Product Showcase 90 min New arrivals Friday 19:00-21:00 Flash Sale 120 min Volume sales Sunday 15:00-16:30 Installation Tutorial 90 min Education

docs.title: A. The "Compatibility Q&A" Format
docs.text:
Purpose: Answer "Does this fit my [Car Model]?"

Flow: 1. Opening (5 min): "Drop your car model + year in comments, I'll check compatibility live" 2. Q&A Session (60-75 min): Go through comments, pull parts, show fitment 3. Flash Offers (15 min): Limited-time bundles for engaged viewers 4. Closing (5 min): Reminder to follow, next live schedule

What You Need: - Full compatibility database (printed or digital) - Physical samples of top 20 parts - Measuring tools (calipers, rulers) - Sample vehicles or detailed photos

docs.title: B. The "Installation Workshop" Format
docs.text:
Purpose: Build authority and demonstrate quality

Flow: 1. Introduction (10 min): Today's project overview 2. Preparation (15 min): Tools needed, safety first 3. Step-by-step (45-60 min): Actual installation demonstration 4. Testing (10 min):" Verify installation success 5. Q&A (10 min):** Answer live questions

Popular Workshop Topics: - Brake pad replacement (most common) - Oil and filter change - Spark plug replacement - Air filter installation - Headlight bulb upgrade - Basic diagnostic with OBD reader

docs.title: C. The "Clearance Flash Sale" Format
docs.text:
Purpose: Move inventory quickly

Tactics: - Countdown timers on screen - Limited quantities announced - Bundle deals ("3 for Rp 199k") - Free shipping thresholds - Exclusive live-only prices - "Next 5 orders get free gift"

docs.title: 3.3 Live Stream Best Practices
docs.text:
Before Going Live: - Test internet connection (minimum 5 Mbps upload) - Set up good lighting (face well-lit, product visible) - Prepare parts within arm's reach - Charge phone to 100% + have backup power - Create promotional materials (prices on cards)

During Live: - Engagement Rule: Acknowledge every comment by name - Energy: Maintain high energy - viewers join/leave constantly - Repetition: Repeat key info every 5 minutes (new viewers joining) - Visuals: Show product from multiple angles - Urgency: Create genuine scarcity and time limits

After Live: - Send thank you messages to top engagers - Process orders immediately - Reply to missed comments - Schedule next live within 48 hours - Analyze metrics (views, engagement, sales)

docs.title: 4.1 The "Expert Network" Approach
docs.text: You don't need a million followers; you need 10 "Car Guys" who have 10,000 loyal followers each.

docs.title: 4.2 Finding Affiliates
docs.text:
Search Hashtags: - #TipsOtomotif (automotive tips) - #ModifikasiMobil (car modifications) - #Bengkel (workshop) - #ReviewOtomotif - #Sparepart - #OliMobil

Profile Criteria: - 5,000-50,000 followers (micro-influencers) - Automotive content >70% of posts - Engagement rate >3% - Indonesian audience >80% - Consistent posting (3+/week)

docs.title: 4.3 Commission Structure
docs.text: Tier Commission Requirements Support Bronze 5-8% 1-5 sales/month Basic product info Silver 10-12% 6-15 sales/month Free samples Gold 15-18% 16-30 sales/month Free samples + Exclusive previews Platinum 20-25% 30+ sales/month Co-branded content, wholesale pricing

docs.title: 4.4 Content Collaboration Types
docs.text:
Type 1: Product Review (One-time) - You send free product - Creator makes review video - Uses your affiliate link in bio - Timeline: 1-2 weeks

Type 2: Tutorial Series (Ongoing) - Monthly content collaboration - Installation guides featuring your parts - Brand mention in every video - Timeline: 3-month contract

Type 3: Brand Ambassador (Exclusive) - Exclusive partnership - Mention competitor restrictions - Monthly content quota - Product line endorsement - Timeline: 6-12 months

docs.title: 5.3 Ad Creative Best Practices
docs.text:
High-Performing Ad Formats: 1. UGC Style (User Generated Content) - Authentic, selfie-style 2. Before/After Transformation - Clear visual impact 3. 3-Second Problem Hook - Immediate problem identification 4. Social Proof - Reviews, ratings, sales numbers 5. Tutorial Style - Educational + promotional

Creative Testing Framework: - Test 3-5 hooks per product - Test 2-3 CTAs - Run each variant for minimum 3 days - Minimum Rp 100,000 per variant for statistical significance - Kill anything under 1.5% CTR within 24 hours - Scale winners 20% daily until ROAS drops

docs.title: 6.1 Warehouse & Processing
docs.text:
Same-Day Processing Requirements: - Orders before 15:00 WIB: Same day pickup - Orders after 15:00 WIB: Next day pickup - Weekend orders: Process Monday morning

Recommended Warehouse Setup: | Location | Coverage | Courier Access | |----------|----------|----------------| | Jakarta | Jabodetabek + West Java | All couriers, fastest | | Surabaya | East Java + Bali | All couriers | | Bandung | West Java priority | J&T, JNE strong | | Medan | Sumatra | J&T, SiCepat |

docs.title: 6.3 Packaging Standards for Auto Parts
docs.text:
Protection Levels:

Part Type Packaging Requirement Est. Cost Filters Bubble wrap + plastic bag Rp 3,000-5,000 Small Electronics Bubble wrap + inner box + outer box Rp 8,000-12,000 Brake Pads Corrugated wrap + plastic Rp 5,000-8,000 Spark Plugs Foam insert + small box Rp 4,000-6,000 Heavy Components Double-wall box + corner protection Rp 15,000-25,000 Oils/Fluids Sealed bag + absorbent material + double box Rp 12,000-18,000

Required Labels: - "Handle With Care" for all packages - "Liquid - Fragile" for oils/fluids - "This Side Up" for specific components - SNI certification symbols where applicable

docs.title: 7.1 TikTok Shop Policy Alignment
docs.text:
Prohibited Auto Parts (Cannot Sell): - Used/recycled airbags and components - Counterfeit branded parts (fake NGK, Bosch, etc.) - Odometer manipulation tools - License plate covers/obscurers - Radar detectors (police scanner type) - Illegal exhaust modifications - Fuel line components that bypass emissions - Stolen/recovered parts without documentation

Restricted (Need Documentation): - OEM branded parts (proof of authenticity required) - Performance modifications (may need certification) - Hazardous materials (MSDS required for fluids) - Electronics with radio transmitters (postel certification)

docs.title: 7.2 SNI Certification Requirements
docs.text: Product Category SNI Required Certificate Validity Body Brake Pads Yes - SNI 09-0944-2003 4 years KAN accredited Helmets Yes - SNI 1811:2007 4 years LSPro Seat Belts Yes - SNI 06-2481-1991 4 years LSPro Lighting Yes - varies by type 4 years LSPro Batteries Yes - SNI 06-4752-1998 4 years LSPro Tires Yes - SNI 06-0098-2006 4 years LSPro Filters No N/A N/A Lubricants No (but quality standards apply) N/A N/A

docs.title: 7.3 Content Guidelines
docs.text:
Prohibited in TikTok Content: - ❌ Showing illegal installations - ❌ Speeding/dangerous driving demonstrations - ❌ Tampering with emissions control systems - ❌ Counterfeit comparisons using trademarked logos ( risky) - ❌ Unsafe workshop practices - ❌ False claims ("increase horsepower by 50%")

Required Disclaimers: - "Professional installation recommended" for complex parts - "Results may vary" for performance claims - "Check compatibility before purchase" - Age restrictions for tools (18+)
